"C:\Users\Riz Pardazandeh\scoop\apps\cmake\current\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\RIZPAR~1\scoop\apps\mingw\current\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\app.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\RIZPAR~1\scoop\apps\mingw\current\bin\C__~1.EXE -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o app.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libapp.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\app.dir\linkLibs.rsp
